positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed mandala composition featuring stylized flora, celestial motifs, and ancient geometric patterns. Incorporate elements like blooming night-blooming flowers, crescent moons, shooting stars, and delicate constellations interwoven with intricate, continuous line work. The style must be a luxurious combination of Art Nouveau etching and modern negative space minimalism, rendered with deep sapphire blues, rich emerald greens, and striking metallic gold accents against an off-white background. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and extreme contrast. Central composition, suitable for scalable apparel printing. Highly detailed, vector graphic quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: low quality, worst quality, blurry, out of frame, deformed, watermark, signature, cropped, text, logo, messy lines, duplicate, grain, artifact, poorly drawn hands, poor anatomy
